McpServerDefinition.description: this tool is used for getting account analytic

tools.descriptionOverride: Runs aggregations over the Account object and returns a human-readable summary. Choose the analytics with mode — top_revenue (largest accounts by AnnualRevenue), by_industry (distribution across industries, or a drill-in when industry is supplied), recent (most recently created), or health_summary (overall data completeness and totals). Results respect the running user sharing and field-level security.
